examples: Meanwhile, N-TiO2 nanoparticles were also used to synthesize Schiff base Salicylaldehyde o-aminophenol.
OBJECTIVE To synthesize and select novel derivatives of salicylaldehyde-phenylamine Schiff base with high insecticidal activity against the Fascila hepatica.
Chitosan Schiff-base palladium catalyst was synthesized from chitosan and salicylaldehyde via grafting to form chitosan Schiff-base, followed by coordination with palladium salt.
